title: fritillaria lusitanica subsp. hispanica
intro: Fritillaria lusitanica subsp. hispanica, also known as the Spanish fritillaria, is a type of bulbous perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Fritillaria lusitanica subsp. hispanica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are often used to treat respiratory issues and can be found in traditional Chinese medicine and some Western herbal remedies.
